title: AltDefault - Fix
description: This is a fixed version of the AltDefault texturepack by Domovishche6986 for Beta 1.7.3.
body:
This is a fixed version of the **AltDefault** texturepack by **Domovishche6986**. Unused assets not included in beta 1.7.3 have also been removed.

The author of the original version of this texture pack is [Domovishche6986](https://modrinth.com/user/Domovishche6986) - [AltDefault - Legacy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/altdefault-legacy)

![Minecraft Beta](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e5ef87fa7e7b26dcd9b844e0f2d4d24126f3853_0.webp)

**Fixed:**
- Pig texture
- Cow texture
- Сharcoal texture
- Сhest texture

**Added:**
- New workbench interface
- New furnace interface
